x-fal-metadata.about:
Apply impulse response (IR) convolution reverb to audio.

Uses FFmpeg's afir filter to convolve the input audio with an impulse
response file, creating realistic reverb and spatial effects.
Supports wet/dry mix control and loudness normalization.
